description: Integration bridge connecting Shadow-Hunting to Rosetta-Shape-Core. Shadows are the missing variables — what standard models dismiss as waste. Boundaries are LOGOS scope_violations. Shadow-hunting IS the systematic attack on arbitrary boundaries.
